channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics

item.title: Tiffany Trump's father-in-law Massad Boulos to become senior adviser on Arab affairs
item.description: "Massad is an accomplished lawyer and a highly respected leader in the business world, with extensive experience on the International scene," Trump wrote.
item.dc:creator: Ian Swanson, NewsNation

item.title: Wisconsin Democratic leader Ben Wikler enters the race to lead the national party
item.description: WEST PALM BEACH, Fla. (AP) — Ben Wikler, chair of the Democratic Party in Wisconsin, said Sunday he has joined the race to lead the national party after an election that swept Donald Trump and Republicans to power in Washington.
item.dc:creator: FATIMA HUSSEIN, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: President Biden gives remarks for World AIDS Day
item.description: The White House is holding an event Sunday to commemorate World AIDS Day with survivors, their families, and advocates.
item.dc:creator: Mike Costanza, NewsNation

item.title: Car sales could drop 27% under Trump's plan to eliminate EV tax credit
item.description: President-elect Donald Trump has suggested eliminating the federal tax credit for electric vehicles, and some experts expect a drop in EV sales to follow.
item.dc:creator: Ashley Soriano, NewsNation

item.title: Trump threatens '100% Tariffs' on countries that buck US dollar
item.description: “They can go find another ‘sucker!’ There is no chance that the BRICS will replace the U.S. Dollar in International Trade, and any Country that tries should wave goodbye to America.
item.dc:creator: Ashleigh Fields, NewsNation

item.title: Trump nominates Kash Patel to lead FBI
item.description: President-elect Trump plans to nominate Kash Patel to serve as head of the FBI, elevating a staunch ally and controversial figure who sparked internal battles during the first Trump administration.
item.dc:creator: Rebecca Beitsch, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Trump's picks for key positions in his second administration
item.description: President-elect Donald Trump has filled the key posts for his second term in office, prioritizing loyalty to him after he felt bruised and hampered by internal squabbling during his first term.
item.dc:creator: THOMAS BEAUMONT, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Trump tariffs threaten to crack open North American economies
item.description: MEXICO CITY — President-elect Trump’s pledge to impose tariffs on Mexico and Canada threatens to upend decades of North American integration, a bumpy process that’s recast the two U.S. neighbors as providers of raw and finished goods for the world’s biggest economy.
item.dc:creator: Rafael Bernal, NewsNation

item.title: New York Democrat proposes secession to join Canada, opposing Trump
item.description: State Sen. Liz Krueger, whose district includes Manhattan, proposed New York should secede and become a province of Canada.
item.dc:creator: Ashley Soriano, NewsNation

item.title: Canadian Prime Minister Trudeau flies to Florida to meet with Trump after tariffs threat
item.description: WEST PALM BEACH, Fla. (AP) — Canadian Prime Minister Justin Trudeau flew to Florida on Friday to have dinner with President-elect Donald Trump at his Mar-a-Lago club after Trump threatened to impose sweeping tariffs on Canadian products.
item.dc:creator: ROB GILLIES and FATIMA HUSSEIN, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Canada's Trudeau says he had an 'excellent conversation' with Trump after tariffs threat
item.description: The Canadian prime minister's meeting with Donald Trump at Mar-a-Lago came after the president-elect's threat to impose tariffs on two of America's leading trade partners raised alarms.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, MPR News

item.title: GOP senator: Americans don’t care about FBI background checks for Trump nominees
item.description: Sen. Bill Hagerty (R-Tenn.), who was rumored to be on Trump’s shortlist to serve as Treasury secretary, said most Americans “don’t care” whether Trump uses the FBI to vet his nominees, something fellow Republican senators have demanded.
item.dc:creator: Alexander Bolton, NewsNation

item.title: VIDEO: Donald Trump celebrates Thanksgiving alongside Elon Musk, family in Mar-a-Lago
item.description: President-elect Donald Trump celebrated Turkey Day alongside his family, and other notable figures in South Florida this year.
item.dc:creator: Sara Filips, WFLA, NBC

item.title: The Supreme Court will hear arguments over Tennessee's ban on gender-affirming care for minors
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — Advocates for transgender rights are turning to a conservative-dominated Supreme Court after a presidential election in which Donald Trump and his allies promised to roll back protections for transgender people.
item.dc:creator: MARK SHERMAN and GEOFF MULVIHILL, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Ranking the Democrats: Here's who the party could nominate next as president
item.description: Democrats are licking their wounds after Vice President Harris’s defeat to President-elect Trump, but already are looking toward who might lead their party in a 2028 presidential contest. It’s a fight that looks wide open.
item.dc:creator: Amie Parnes, NewsNation

item.title: Democratic lawmakers report Thanksgiving bomb threats against their homes
item.description: At least five Democratic members of Congress from Connecticut were targeted by bomb threats on Thursday. Police who responded said they found no evidence of explosives on the lawmakers' properties.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, MPR News
